notableEvents.label: Jorge Soler GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jorge Soler grounds into a double play, third baseman Ryan McMahon to second baseman Amed Rosario to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Jo Adell out at 2nd. Jorge Soler out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Mike Trout GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Mike Trout grounds into a double play, shortstop José Caballero to second baseman Amed Rosario to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Bryce Teodosio out at 2nd. Mike Trout out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Mike Trout rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Mike Trout grounds into a double play, shortstop José Caballero to second baseman Amed Rosario to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Bryce Teodosio out at 2nd. Mike Trout out at 1st.
